## Pull Request Description

Please describe the modifications proposed in this PR. Mention if it relates to documentation updates, formatting improvements, or issue templates.

*Note: Since the core WexSay app and API codebases are proprietary, code PRs targeting core systems will be closed. Use this only for documentation, guidelines, or configuration edits.*

---

## Related Issue

Does this PR resolve an existing public issue?
*Fixes #* (e.g. *Fixes #12*)

---

## Verification Checklist

Please verify the following:
- [ ] No private source code, API keys, or confidential tokens are exposed.
- [ ] Formatting is clean, properly formatted Markdown, and has no typos.
- [ ] Links and references are valid and up-to-date.
